review_text: Great Gday Holiday Park. Crystal Cascades. Lovely amenaties just 15 - 20 min from Cairns central. Pool and creek 5 min walk. Enjoyable.
Very nice hosts,  grounds beautifully kept.  Amenities lovely and clean and tidy.   Great caravan park.
We stayed in the caravan park. Friendly, competent reception. Ablution, kitchen and other amenities very clean and high standard.
A beautiful park with all the facilities and more.. close to some beautiful walks along the creeks and shops if need be. Great bird life around and a lovely manager.

Lovely quiet park, great location.|Friendly staff, fantastic helpful manager. |We stayed in 2 cabins which were clean, comfortable and well maintained.|Pool looked lovely, there is a great fenced playground for the kids. |Well set up camp kitchen.

Lovely quiet park.
Friendly staff, great location.
We stayed in 2 cabins which were clean, comfortable and well maintained.
Thankyou Besko for a great stay.

If your in Cairns and want a clean, quiet and friendly park to stay at then Crystal Cascades is the one. Nice pool,  great under cover BBQ next to the pool and handy coffee at the pony club over the road and a great shopping center a couple of klms away.

Nice Campsite with super amenities (shower, toilets, kitchen was 5 stars) and the wifi was ok. Just behind he campsite you have a path to walk, run, walk or cycle, you also have the river. There is a swimming pool.
Park run really well, great facilities, situated next to beautiful creek. Staff friendly and helpful. Nothing was too much trouble. Family had a wonderful time.

Highly recommended!|Our family loved our stay at Crystal Cascades Holiday Park.  It is the most beautiful park in Cairns,  close to everything and walking distance from the swimming creek children adore and numerous walking and bike trails around, including breathtaking waterfall!||The park and our cabin was meticulously clean and well maintained. |The feel of our stay was like we were on the retreat and the staff goes extra mile to accommodate you.|The park is surrounded by rainforest and is true oase.||Recently the park went under new ownership and management , and they renovated and upgraded the park.||We have travelled from Nsw to here, and this was our true home away from home!||If you are family or traveller that is after rejuvenating and active holiday on handy a location, this is for you!

Highly recommend!
This was the best Holiday  park experience we had travelling from Newcastle to Cairns. And we did stayed in many parks on our way to Cairns!
We stayed at the cabin overlooking the beautiful mountain. The morning mist with the sound of birds and freshly brewed coffee, is the best moment to have!
The cabin were very clean and home like. It was our home away from home.
The park just changed its ownership/ management in March 2026.
Everyone is so helpful and friendly. They work tirelessly to make park even more beautiful and cabins more comfy.
We even feasted on bananas growing next to our cabin!
Kids enjoyed the pool and nearby creek, every day. We even fed the horse that live accros the park entrance!
From this park everything is close to go for.
We loved  the quiet nights and the sound of rainforest and birds, morning walk to crystal cascades creek.
Their grounds are kept meticulously clean and their washer and dryer is only $5, cheapest we came across!

We recommend it to all and will definitely be back!

I cannot recommend enough Crystal  Cascades Holiday Park in Redlynch. It's a beautifully maintained park with palm trees and birds surrounded by rainforest, with easy access to Northern Beaches. Staff is very helpful and friendly. Loved my stay there.
Nice and quiet location,  very peaceful and relatively close to Cairns attractions. Might be too quiet and isolated for some people.

Exceptional facilities, spotless bathrooms and a lovely camp kitchen. All the staff from reception to cleaning and groundskeepers were very helpful and friendly. Thank you very much, I would recommend your park wholeheartedly
Very good everyone here was very nice and helpful recommended staying here I will be back for my next holiday 😀 😊 👍

2025 Wieder super Aufenthalt mit eigener Sanitäranlage. Top Personal super nett und freundlich.

2019 Sehr schöner und sehr ordentlicher Caravan Park in einer tropischen Umgebung. Sehr gepflegte Sanitäranlagen und Waschmaschinen. Das Personal war super freundlich und die Anlage war schön gestaltet.

We were really disappointed with the unfriendly attitude from the older staff, especially towards the kids. The lady that walks the two dogs around (I think she is manager) made us all feel really uncomfortable and unwelcome. Never once said hello, just scolded at the girls every time she would walk past. We get the feeling that kids shouldn’t be seen or heard at all. We’ve been travelling for 18 months and this is the first time we’ve felt this way, it was really unpleasant.

Absolute paradise just 20min drive to Cairns central. Gorgeous views of the surrounding rainforest hills, and great amenities,  friendly staff and each site has slabs to park alongside of.  Pool is wonderful,  good shade and a great BBQ area alongside the pool area.   Crystal Cascades waterfall only 5 minute drive away, although the river alongside the camp is perfect for a refreshing dip, and plenty of walking tracks straight out of the camp.  Dog friendly.
Top location, peaceful and clean facilities.
Beautiful surroundings, nice camping spots, and clean amenities.
Quiet, nice location. Waking bike tracks nearby. Cafe, pool on-site
Very relaxing quiet close to Crystal Cascades and shopping centre

Camped in a tent and Swag and it was very quiet, not being near any main roads. Facilities are very well maintained and clean. Playground for the kids, nice pool area. Next to a gorgeous walking track and creek. Only downside was no hot water for showers at 7.30 at night.

The Park is OK.
As usual because it's a big corporation that owns the park ( G'day ) the site's are tight , so because of this there are no walk ways between to the one and only ablution block , which is Clean and spotless , so naturally arrogant lazy people still insist on walking through site's .
Great laundry facilities with 5 x washing and 5 x dryers.
Just 20 minutes for Cairns City Centre and nestled in a valley surrounded by the Wet tropics rainforest.
On a foot note feels safe.
Powered site.

BEWARE- If you are a G’day park member and want to book online, then use the G’day park site, to book through. DO NOT BOOK DIRECT THROUGH THE ACTUAL CRYSTAL CASCADES SITE.  As it does not say it is a G’day park. We booked through the actual park site, unaware they were a g’day park,   So we payed full price, there was no provision or indication that they were a member of g’day.  Upon looking up the park later to check facilities, I noticed it actually came up on the G’day park site, where the provision to put in your membership, was available, for the members price.  I explained this to the park, but they wouldn’t refund the difference as we had already made payment.  I have attached photos to explain what I mean.  In saying this, the park is nice, amenities clean and tidy, with a nice pool.  I found reception was a bit hit and miss in terms of opening hours.  Seemed to be all over the place.  It is about 25 minutes to cairns.  And is a nice quiet park.  We would stay again, but I will make sure I book through the correct site for the member discount next time.
I had a van site near the camp kitchen for 42 days.  Enjoyed my stay.

Perfect place to stay while in cairns! Nice and quiet. Clean amenities and good size grass with slab sites. $6 laundry coats. Gas bottle exchange and can book tourist tours from the office. Lovely view of the ranges and very close to Cascade falls. Definitely will come back!

Beautiful scenery in a smaller park. We stayed in a cabin, it was for wheelchair access though we did not require this (unsure why we had it). Good size. Bed was comfy and the bbq and pool areas are great.

Sites seemed crammed in from the back end and with the “neighbours” smoke from their cigarettes wafting through our annex made for a very unpleasant stay.  Not forgetting the traffic noise from early morning.  In saying this park was clean and staff welcoming.

Not so quiet and peaceful as the description makes out! Near a busy road and a quarry, trucks and traffic.  Many tradies staying who like to drink and smoke and talk very loudly until all hours, with radios or TVs on, then they are up at 5am with noisy utes and headlights into our van. We were there for 7 nights, the first 3 had parties that went on after midnight.
The ensuite bathroom did not get cleaned once.
Wifi is non-existent despite us being next to the bbq which apparently was the best spot for wifi. We told reception, and she admitted it doesn't work.
Then on our last day, we met the manager, O boy what a rude lady, did not care about the noisy tradies as "they are the bulk of our business", made me feel like 2nd class as we are mere tourists.
On the upside, the pool was great, lovely walks behind the property, and the cafe opposite was really good, great coffee and food.
.
First day of 10 so far all good.

Great holiday park located 15min drive outside of cairns city. Quiet environment with mountains on both side of the estate. Full of wildlife especially birds.
Creeks is just 5min walk where you can have a good dips.

Crystal Cascade waterfalls is 5min drive where you find this awesome falls. IG spot.

Night sky is breathtaking. Just outside the cabin and you get a great view of star constellation and milky way.

Host/reception are friendly and helpful. They assisted me with my booking for the various day activities and provide good information.

We will be back!

The park is located in a great location walking distance to Crystal Cascades. The ensuite site we booked was nice, plenty of room. The ensuite was nice & clean, one of the best we have used. We enjoyed our stay and would happily return.
This place is a gem! Shopping center not far away, great for big families, wonderful accommodating staff. We will be back

This is the best park we have stayed in. Clean, tidy, lush and green, with all the amenities needed and a beautiful swimming pool to all nestled in a beautiful spot between two large hills. The staff were all friendly and couldn’t have been more welcoming and helpful. AND a great coffee shop only 100m away.

Graeme and Elizabeth

So much pride taken to keep this place in superb condition and cleanliness. Very much appreciated and enjoyed. |An iconic cool water swimming hole is a stones throw away across the road.  |Traveling with 2 dogs, and finding lots of soft clean mown grass to play and walk on was wonderful. |This is our third visit and definitely more to come. 👏
A few more rubbish bins would make it great

We were very happy with our stay at Cairns Crystal Cascades. The park is situated in a very quiet location in the rainforest.  The cabin was spacious, the queen bed was comfortable, the shower was spacious and the cabin contained all we required.

We booked so-called 'Superior' Family Villa in September for four nights paying above $800.
Unfortunately the 'superior' villa has a smell of mold, presumably connected to a wobbly floor in one bedroom.
We have reported the issue to the office, but they were unfriendly and not helpful.
We are from interstate, and could not find an alterantive accommodation due to high season, and had to stay for two nights out of four. Needless to say the Holiday Park refused to make a refund for two nights.
Although the location is good, I cannot rate this business with more than a single star.

Very relaxing spot nestled in the valley of Freshwater creek and the walks alongside the creek are very shaded and pleasant.|Staff were very helpful and friendly.|The new cabins are very thoughtfully laid out and decorated.|The bbq gazebo is a nice place to relax in the evenings with a pleasant outlook over the pool.|Cabins are spotlessly clean and well maintained.|The park is pet friendly which is very important to those of us who like to take our dogs with us.|We also found the staff to be very helpful in arranging our tours for us and suggesting a couple of very good nearby restaurants.

Beautiful park in a quiet location surrounded by lush mountains.

Amenities were clean everyday ,
Camp kitchen  had toasters/kettles/small oven /microwave as well as BBQ,

Pet friendly ,( no annoy barking during our stay )

freshwater creek by the side of the park with  cycle/ running track (✌️)

Coles/ Woolies   5min drive away ,

Cairns western link rd 7/9 minutes away for Cooktown/port Douglas / cape tribulation …skyrail/Kuranda village / Barron falls/cascade falls / army museum !!!!!!!!!!

The best Location in CAIRNS stay ,

Whole team( Jill/sharron/phil) happy to give priceless advices about tours with smile 👍

Will definitely stay again( God bless all )Jat/rav

Stayed here before over a decade ago. It is still value for money and quite and just out of the main hustle of Cairns. The only issue we had was a smelly drain (in the bathroom) but apart from that everything else was clean, working and top notch.

We had an en-suite site. Great loaction, Friendly staff, resonably sized sites, price was fair. Quiet area with easy access to walks. We found a few nice spots along the creek to swim and jum in. En-suite was clean and tidy with plenty of room. Pool area was clean and tidy with seating and BBQ facilities. We will be returning.
We have a powered ensuite site , sites are generous and facilities are excellent. Have stayed here for 2 months quiet spot but central to Cairns city and northern beaches, love it.

Ich wünschte, ich könnte null Sterne geben. Obwohl wir per Mail rechtzeitig uns angekündigt haben, standen wir vor verschlossenen Türen. Die Rezeption war schon während der Open Hours geschlossen. Das ist mehr als unangenehm, unprofessionell und allgemein ein sehr schlechter Umgang mit Kunden. Nicht mal auf Anrufe oder Mail-Nachrichten wurde an dem Tag geantwortet. Daher mussten wir umständlich nach einer anderen Alternative suchen. Schade eigentlich.

Not a bad park 18klm out of Cairns. Unfortunately the amenities were only cleaned 2 times in the week we were there. The dump station is a small room with a toilet and the smell was awful, especially when going to the ladies toilets right near. The laundry smelt terrible. Staff were friendly.

Warning think carefully before staying at Crystal Cascades Caravan Park.  My exp was far from good. Have stayed here many times and it’s been lovely both staff and grounds but now under new management it’s terrible.
The office lady is very rude, on arrival at 10:30 she had us all waiting outside on the road until 11am. 8 cars and vans were backed up waiting until 11am when no one was on the site nor was the site mowed for a new arrival.
I’ve never been spoken to like this from any parks I have stayed at.
Arrived the day before to check the site( don’t normally do this but had a feeling it wouldn’t fit) the office lady said that’s the site today it could be different tomorrow.!!!!
Same site and we didn’t fit. I told her that and she insisted we would and took my money. We didn’t fit and couldn’t access the slide out. She had nothing else and Cairns was full. We were in a pickle. She refunded the money and told me it would be back Friday ( 5 days later)  8 days later it still hasn’t come back. I rang again they were rude to me and said you will have to wait. No compassion for this situation they had put us in just to bad!!!!
The past staff were friendly and the park was well maintained. NOW I would never stay here again. This new staff need training in customer service and maintaining the grounds.
Keep treating your coustomers like this you won’t have any.

Park very busy & sites not very big,..a little cramped. Having said that,..well located away from main hwy & near Cascades & shops just up the road a little. Facilities acceptable, although more bins around Park would be a good idea.
Worst reception I've ever experienced, person on the phone has no communication skills what so ever , she was that rude I had to just hang the phone up on her ..... (Sharon)
A very beautifully located campsite. The camp kitchen and toilets were clean! The staff was super helpful in choosing the local tours.

The sites are a decent enough size but could definitely be longer. Our friends in a 19ft van only just fit on their site. The roads are fairly narrow as well, so backing a trailer in can be really fiddly and difficult, especially if the site across the road from you has someone on it

The sites are very lucious and green with a concrete pad and there is plenty of room to park your car on the site as well (except 2 sites i saw didn't have a car park space).

One large amenities block with plenty of toilets and showers. The 'dump point' is located at the amenities block and is purely a toilet with no lid or seat. Probably one of the more unpleasant dump points i've used and when walking past (as there is no door) the dump point does emit a rather pungent smell most of the day. I'd highly suggest if you're placed in any site opposite the dump point to request a different site.

Pool is great. Really good size and depth, super clean as well. Great poolside decking area too, was very nice to hang around at

We did have a green ant nest in a tree behind our site, which actually resulted in the ants dropping off the tree and onto our camper and starting to build nests. Maintenance came and removed the nest, but there was still millions of ants on the tree, so just beware.
Great place to visit. Friendly staff with clean amenities

Great park to stay at whilst in Cairns.  Surrounded by rainforest. The Managers are great, park is maintained lovely and the camp kitchen has everything you need and spotlessly clean! We spent 2 weeks here including a 5 night trip to Melbourne where we were allowed to keep the van where it was just unplugged for a very reasonable rate.  We appreciated Crystal Cascades hospitality and Highly recommended 😊

The campground as such is not too bad. Kinda big and lots of people so if you are looking for a little hideaway this isn't it. The facilities are mostly clean except the kitchen which is dirty. I don't say it's bad, it was just a bit of a shock to the system after having been in a near perfect campground without much people up the daintree.

Un grand camp de vacances, avec différents types d'hébergement, de la place pour caravane à la villa. Nous avions une cabine Kingfisher. Clim, cuisine avec plaques gaz, bien équipée. Dommage que le lit ne soit pas séparé de la pièce principale. Le taux d'humidité et la chaleur à l'extérieur ne nous ont pas permis d'utiliser la terrasse, dommage. Espace barbecue collectif et petite piscine. Belle localisation, proche des Crystal Cascades et quelques petites randonnées à proximité. A un 1/4 d'heure de Cairns, à l'écart de l'agitation de la ville.

Two adults and two young children stayed comfortably in Ulysses Villa. Lovely clean accommodation with pool and BBQ facilities, friendly on site management. 5 min from Coles / Woolworths, McDonald’s and Coles Express. 15-20 mins to City centre. Highly recommend and would stay again.
Quaint park our of town, close to Redlynch shopping centre, not far from Crystal Cascades

Stayed in cabin 4, room wasn't ready on arrival had to wait two hours, had dirty ac, and fans, the shower was mouldy and had ants & dirt in the shower corners. light globs blown in the bathroom, batteries not working in television control, wifi reception was horrible.. definitely not worth the price they charge. Extremely rude front desk receptionist tried to blame me for their lack of room maintenance and hung up on me over the phone.. don't waste your money staying here 💯

My family and I stayed at a powered site for 6 days! It felt like 2 weeks!
The shared kitchen is filthy, the showers were always grimy. The pool is that grimy people have managed to write their names around the edge of the pool.
There was 1 lovely lady at reception that worked on the Sunday we checked in but otherwise the lady that was their every other day was rude and and made me feel uncomfortable.
The power point attached to our site and the next doors was faulty and I talked to reception about it. As the power would just switch off. She didn’t get it fixed and then tried putting new people in the same spot. Luckily I had said something to them before they set up and they changed their powered site. Apparently the receptionist forgot about the power issues!!! There was also an aggressive man and our children watched him hit his daughter badly, police were called and reception let this man stay for the remainder of our visit, which made it worse for our family as we couldn’t leave our caravan without seeing him.
I would never recommend staying here, it’s extremely unprofessional, unhygienic and definitely not worth half of the money we spent here.

Absolutely loved our stay here. We had a few nights in a powered site the 1st time we stayed, then we came back a week later for another 3 nights and booked an ensuite site. Large sites, clean amenities, lovely pool are and friendly staff. The location is magnificent, we loved the walks by Freshwater Creek and the dog loved swimming. Highly recommend.

Dirty and unhygienic cabin 13. Extremely dirty ceiling fans and mould on the bathroom exhaust. Not to mention that they do not clean the cabin or change the towels unless you stay 7 nights or more. We stayed for 6 nights.
On a positive note, the bed was comfortable.

Visited here from England, our last stop after 3.5 months travelling up queensland coast. All sites we used whilst on our trip were good but we felt that this site just had the edge. All the staff are excellent, the site itself is extremely clean and well looked after. Do not usually do reviews but this site really left a memory with us. All site staff were excellent but we would like to say a special thank u to the young man on reception who went far beyond our expectation when we had a problem with a hotel booking. And the young ladies who do the cleaning who also helped us when we were leaving. Thank u so much crystal cascade team for making it a memorable stay.

Here we are 2 years later minus the van staying in CCCHP cabin 10 with our pup Kobi she had a fabulous holiday  !! And we had dome wet weather  but oh boy I love everything about this holiday park absolutely no complaints about the weather from us and the staff are fantastic we can’t wait to get back there same time for 2024 !!We just love this Redlynch park set amongst cane fields at the foot of the mountains in a valley alongside Freshwater Creek North of Cairns cbd 5km from a good shopping centre Fantastic Camp kitchen with an oven and excellent hot barbecues well maintained beautiful and green sites Huge amenities block and a very clean and well maintained laundry Very nice swimming pool too Great walks along the Freshwater creek and only a 20 km bike ride to the Esplanade This is what we like to call our Winter home thank you so much to all the team we will see you all next year

I can't comment on the rooms, or caravan sites as they were completely booked out.
Maybe next time...

We reached just now , and looks a nice place  for a night stay , but the place allocated us , near the big trash full of all the waste, and can’t sit or stand because of mosquito's,
It’s a disappointing experience
And the management has to make-an action above matter urgently

We were extremely disappointed with the park management. We booked two sites for my sons family and us in early June for the beginning of August and they said we would be next to each other. We arrived a day early and the lady said she could move things around so we could have our site. She didn't say that when my sons family arrived they would be stuck out the front of the park and we were at the back. It ruined our holiday my grandsons were devastated they weren't close and visits were restricted due to the constant rain and mud everywhere. When I complained the women at the office said well if you don't like it we'll give you a refund, knowing that we had no other choice we had eight nights booked and paid for. I truly hope more people complain about the way these people treat their customers. One day they may need people in their parks and I hope people go else where because I know we will never be going back.
Very friendly and helpful staff, beautiful grass, convenient location to explore Cairns

Such a beautiful little spot ,nice and peaceful location,shower nice & hot ,very clean and tidy cabins,very kids friendly,friendly staff who makes you feel welcomed ,will definitely be coming back here 😌👍🏾.

Clean facilities. Nice place to stay - caravan sites can be small and tight. Few minutes drive to Redlynch Shopping Centre. Tennis Club over road from park is dog friendly & has a Cafe that opens 6.30a Mon-Sat for early Coffee & breakfast.

Good clean park
We had some caravan problems
They helped us out
Staff very friendly
It is lovely and quiet.
